details.effect: [evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Combo (3): Summon a Crystalia Eve token.
On Evolve: Select a Crystalia Eve token on your field. Give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Rush.
Storm. [lastwords] Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may put a [forestcraft] follower from among them onto your field. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order.
While this card is on your field, your followers take 1 less damage from enemy abilities.
Rush. Strike, banish a card in your EX area: Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field. Deal it 2 damage and summon 2 Fairy tokens.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Combo (4): Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
On Evolve: Select an enemy card that costs 3 play points or less on the field and destroy it.

[evolve][cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Crystalian or Pixie follower from among them and add it to your hand. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order.
On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field and put it on the bottom of its owner's deck.
[fanfare] Choose one of the following. (1) Select a Pixie follower on your field and give it [attack]+2/[defense]+2. (2) Search your deck for a Pixie follower, reveal it, and add it to your hand.
Select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and deal them 1 damage. Combo (3): Deal 2 damage instead.
Whenever one of your followers evolves, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
[fanfare] Give your leader [defense]+3.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. Ward. [fanfare] Give this follower [attack]+X. X equals the number of cards in your EX area.
Ward. On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals this follower's attack.
Whenever one of your followers evolves, put a Fairy Wisp token into your EX area.
Rush. [fanfare] Put a Thorn Burst token into your EX area.
[evolve][cost03]: Evolve this follower. Storm.
Storm. On Evolve: For the rest of this turn, this follower doesn't take combat damage. Strike: Refresh this follower. Perform this ability only once per turn.
Rush. Assail. During your turn, whenever this follower deals combat damage, refresh it.
[fanfare] Choose one of the following. (1) Select a follower that costs 3 play points or less in your hand and put it onto your field. (2) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 5 damage to it and this follower. [lastwords] Summon a Leonidas's Resolve token.
Ward. [act][cost02], [engage]: Summon 2 Shield Guardian tokens.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower.

Assail. On Evolve: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. From among them, you may reveal a Levin follower with a different name from this card and add it to your hand. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[q][act][engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 3 damage and put a Knight token into your EX area.
Whenever one of your followers evolves, give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[act][cost03]: Give this follower Storm and Bane.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve: Search your deck for up to 2 Officer followers, reveal them, and add them to your hand.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage. If any of your followers have been destroyed this turn, deal 4 damage instead.
[fanfare] Search your deck for a Princess follower, reveal it, and add it to your hand.

[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Discard your hand. Put the top card of your deck into your EX area. Repeat this until your EX area is full. While this card is on your field, include both spells and [runecraft] followers in your cemetery when counting your Spellchain.

On Evolve: Select a follower in your EX area. For the rest of this turn, it costs 5 less to play. On Evolve: Select a spell in your EX area. For the rest of this turn, it costs 5 less to play. While this card is on your field, include both spells and [runecraft] followers in your cemetery when counting your Spellchain.

[fanfare] Summon a Magic Sediment token. [q][act][engage], Earth Rite: Select an enemy follower on the field and give it [attack]-2/[defense]-2. [q][act][engage], Earth Rite: Select another follower on your field and give it [attack]+2/[defense]+2.
If there is a Grea the Dragonborn on your field, this card costs 2 less to play. [evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve: Search your deck for an Academic follower with a different name from this card, reveal it, and add it to your hand.

If there is an Anne, Belle of Mysteria on your field, this card costs 2 less to play. [act][engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. If there is an Anne, Belle of Mysteria on your field, deal 6 damage instead.
[quick] Select an unevolved enemy follower on the field and return it to its owner's hand. Spellchain (10): Put it on top of its owner's deck instead.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve: Summon a Strikeform Golem token. Earth Rite: Give it [attack]+2.
[fanfare] Earth Rite: Select an enemy follower on the field and banish it.
Choose up to 2 of the following. Spellchain (10): Choose up to 3 instead. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. (2) Summon a Guardform Golem token. (3) Draw a card.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Draw a card, then discard a card.
On Evolve: Draw a card, then discard a card.
Ward. [lastwords] Add 2 to a Stack on your field.
Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 5 damage and, if there is an evolved follower on your field, draw a card.
Summon a Magical Pawn token.
Stack. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Deal X damage to each enemy leader and enemy follower on the field. X equals the number of cards in your hand. Discard your hand.
On Evolve: Draw 3 cards.

When this card is discarded, put a Hellflame Dragon token into your EX area. ---------- [fanfare][cost03]: Summon a Hellflame Dragon token. Draw a card. [act][engage], discard a card: Put a Hellflame Dragon token into your EX area. This ability can be activated if Overflow is active for you.
[evolve][cost02]: Evolve this follower. Ward. [fanfare] Summon a Megalorca token. While this card is on your field, your Megalorca tokens have Rush.
Ward. On Evolve: Summon a Megalorca token. While this card is on your field, your Megalorca tokens have Storm.
Increase your maximum play points by 1. Give your leader [defense]+3. Draw a card.
Once on each of your turns, when a Dragon token is put onto your field, select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
On Evolve: Select an enemy follower with 3 defense or less on the field and destroy it.
[fanfare] Select a card in an EX area and transform it into a Dragon token.
[fanfare] Discard a card: Give your leader [defense]+1. At the start of your end phase, if you discarded a card this turn, select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
If you've discarded a card this turn, this card costs 2 less to play.
Whenever one of your followers evolves, give this follower [attack]+2.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Draw a card, then discard a card.
On Evolve, discard a card: Select a Wyrmkin follower in your cemetery and add it to your hand.
[fanfare][cost03]: Summon a Dragon token. This follower deals double attack damage to leaders and double combat damage to followers.
Summon a Draconic Weapon token. If Overflow is active for you, summon 2 instead.

[fanfare] Give this follower [attack]+X/[defense]+X. X equals the number of Forest Bat tokens on your field. [act][cost01], put a Forest Bat token from your field into its owner's cemetery: Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 3 damage to it and 1 damage to its leader.
[evolve][cost02]: Evolve this follower. Ward. [fanfare] Deal 3 damage to your leader.
Ward. On Evolve: Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it and give your leader [defense]+X. X equals the selected follower's attack.
Ward. [lastwords] Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it and give your leader [defense]+X. X equals the selected follower's attack.
Necrocharge (10): This card costs 3 less to play. [evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. Bane. [fanfare] Each opponent discards a random card.
Bane. On Evolve: Change each enemy leader's [defense] to 10.

[fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Vampire card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order. [act][cost01], [engage], put this card into its owner's cemetery: Summon a Forest Bat token.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. Strike: Summon a Forest Bat token.
On Evolve: Put a Forest Bat token into your EX area. Strike: Summon a Forest Bat token.
[fanfare] Put a Ghost token into your EX area. Necrocharge (10): Put 3 instead.
Choose one of the following. (1) Summon X Forest Bat tokens. X equals the number of enemy cards on the field. (2) Give each Forest Bat token on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
Whenever one of your followers evolves, deal 2 damage to each enemy leader.
[fanfare] If Sanguine is active for you, give your leader [defense]+3 and draw a card.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. At the start of your end phase, if Sanguine is active for you, draw a card, then discard a card.
Strike: Deal 1 damage to each leader. At the start of your end phase, if Sanguine is active for you, draw a card, then discard a card.
Necrocharge (7): This follower has Rush and Bane. [fanfare] Put the top 3 cards of your deck into your cemetery.
Choose one of the following. Necrocharge (10): Choose up to 2 instead. (1) Select a follower that costs 2 play points or less in your cemetery and put it onto your field. (2) Summon 2 Ghost tokens.
[evolve][cost02]: Evolve this follower. [evolve] Discard 3 cards: Evolve this follower. Aura. This card can't be destroyed by abilities. (It can still be destroyed by ability damage.)
Aura. On Evolve: For the rest of this turn and during each opponent's next turn, this follower doesn't take damage. This card can't be destroyed by abilities.

This card can't be destroyed by abilities. At the start of your end phase, put a prayer counter on this card. Then, if this card has at least 4 prayer counters, put it into its owner's cemetery, give your leader [defense]+10, and search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your EX area. Those cards cost 0 play points to play.

[evolve][cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an amulet that costs 3 play points or less in your hand and put it onto your field. Whenever an amulet is put onto your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals the amulet's cost.

On Evolve: Summon an Ephemeral Moon token. Give your leader [defense]+3. Whenever an amulet is put onto your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it X damage. X equals the amulet's cost.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. [act][engage], put this card into its owner's cemetery: Draw a card.
Once per turn, when your leader gains [defense], give each follower on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. Ward. [fanfare] Draw a card.
Ward. On Evolve: Give your leader [defense]+2.
At the start of your end phase, if your followers attacked at least 3 times this turn, draw 3 cards.
[fanfare] Summon a Holy Falcon token. [act][cost02], [engage], put this card into its owner's cemetery: Summon a Holy Tiger token.
[fanfare] Give your leader [defense]+2. [act][cost02]: Give your leader [defense]+1.
[fanfare] Select another follower on your field that was put onto the field this turn and give it [attack]+2/[defense]+2.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower that costs 4 play points or less on the field and banish it.
On Evolve: Select a [havencraft] follower in your cemetery and add it to your hand.
[fanfare][cost02]: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.
Ward. [fanfare] Give this follower [defense]+X. X equals the number of other followers with Ward on your field.
[fanfare] Choose up to 2 of the following. (1) Gain 1 Evolution Point. (2) Give your leader [defense]+3. (3) Draw a card. (4) Each opponent discards a card.
[evolve][cost00]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Destroy each other follower on the field. If there are at least 2 enemy followers on the field, this follower can't attack enemy leaders.
On Evolve: Destroy each amulet on the field. If there are at least 2 enemy followers on the field, this follower can't attack enemy leaders.
[fanfare] Deal 3 damage to your leader. Discard a random card.
[evolve][cost01]: Evolve this follower. Ward.
Ward. On Evolve: Recover X play points. X equals the number of faceup followers in your evolve deck. Turn them facedown.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. If it's an evolved follower, deal 4 damage instead.

[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it, then search your deck for a [neutral] follower, reveal it, and add it to your hand.
